title: NTV Friday Road Show 30 Trailer Piano
display_title: NTV Friday Road Show 30 Trailer Piano
wikitext:
[]: NTV Friday Road Show 3.0 Trailer (Piano)             Quote Post by JoeD80 » Thu Jul 12, 2012 10:11 am On khara's twitter there is mention of something Q-related on tonight's (July 13th in Japan) Friday Road Show. The movie that is playing isn't related, so I'm assuming a new trailer? [ETA: sorry for those other posts, I can't seem to edit them to remove them] [ETA2: thanks for fixing that!]

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Jul 12, 2012 3:48 pm Take a look at this: tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) It was later posted on Crunchy: http://www.crunchyroll.com/anime-news/2012/07/06-1/video-evangelion-30-promo-runs-during-ntvs-friday-roadshow Not really a trailer, just a promo.

[]:             Quote Post by cd603 » Thu Jul 12, 2012 3:52 pm Looks like it'll will be shown during the broadcast for My Neighbour Totoro HD. Although this could be a new trailer all together, its most likely the one seen on July 1st. EDIT : ^ or perhaps not...

[]:             Quote Post by JoeD80 » Thu Jul 12, 2012 4:02 pm The tweet from khara was specific about the 13th. Sounds like something new. Not too much time to wait to find out for sure...

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Thu Jul 12, 2012 4:04 pm I say it's too early for a trailer. Didn't the other two films have trailer only two months before release? Ugh, that is some wait time.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Jul 12, 2012 4:27 pm The Road Show on the 13th is Totoro: http://www.ntv.co.jp/kinro/lineup/20120713/index.html And it's the video that I posted, this is where the info came from: http://news.nicovideo.jp/watch/nw305091 Which robotranslates as something like: google wrote: Special program of the video: "Q Rebuild of Evangelion" will be broadcast on Nippon Television on the 13th this month, "My Neighbor Totoro load SHOW Friday!" The third film of the popular anime that are released in theaters on November 17 was found to be premiered in.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Thu Jul 12, 2012 5:39 pm Never say never in regards to a trailer. In comparison to 3.0, the first two films were speedy productions. We don't know exactly what the situation is regarding the film in regards to finished animation. A trailer could easily hit months earlier than expected. BUT, knowing how glorious Khara has been at teasing this series out for years, I wouldn't expect much. Maybe another 20 second ad.

[]:             Quote Post by JoeD80 » Thu Jul 12, 2012 6:20 pm Ornette wrote: And it's the video that I posted, this is where the info came from: http://news.nicovideo.jp/watch/nw305091

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Jul 12, 2012 6:29 pm It could very well be. The video itself was posted by evafan and wasn't part of the news release. Don't know where he got the video from.

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Thu Jul 12, 2012 6:40 pm Id hope this would at least be the july 1st teaser, it would be odd to promote a clip that had allready been seen and was just a mash-up of 1.11 and 2.22 clips anyways. ps Totoro is awsome.

[]:             Quote Post by distopia » Fri Jul 13, 2012 8:44 am any news about it?

[]:             Quote Post by Kuronekodou » Fri Jul 13, 2012 9:06 am The "new images" about eva (最新映像)...was just a clip with a pair of hands playing a piano with the text [ヱヴァンゲリヲン 新劇場版：Q] at the middle of it LOL Some images of the clip here http://amarukeiichi.blog42.fc2.com/blog-entry-1303.html Edit: Video http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SjdoR8YRHYg&feature=youtu.be

[]:             Quote Post by distopia » Fri Jul 13, 2012 9:13 am Very nice trolling... I would like to see a video about it! Edit: ty for the video ;)

[]:             Quote Post by JoeD80 » Fri Jul 13, 2012 9:18 am Piano Angel!

[]:             Quote Post by distopia » Fri Jul 13, 2012 9:23 am Q poster? http://instagram.com/p/NBhs0sQMFx/ http://news.reiliberationparade.com.ar/wp-content/uploads/2012/07/4661550eccf411e1a23c22000a1c9e05_7.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Fri Jul 13, 2012 9:25 am Uhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhh............. Well I gess this is why we love Eva isn't it! Nothing is normal about it!

[]:             Quote Post by Kuronekodou » Fri Jul 13, 2012 9:30 am distopia wrote: Q poster? http://instagram.com/p/NBhs0sQMFx/ http://news.reiliberationparade.com.ar/wp-content/uploads/2012/07/4661550eccf411e1a23c22000a1c9e05_7.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Fri Jul 13, 2012 9:37 am Why can't I hold all these rainbows?

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Fri Jul 13, 2012 9:38 am Huh. Is that... an artsy shot of the guts of a piano or similar instrument? God love ya Anno you crazy bearded person you.

[]:             Quote Post by tomfrom994 » Fri Jul 13, 2012 9:46 am OKAY. HANG ON. Can some one translate that text at the end of the trailer? 「希望は残っているよ。どんな時にもね」 Google Translate only comes up with sporadic gibberish resembling what may be a line from the movie.

The movie that is playing isn't related, so I'm assuming a new trailer? [ETA: sorry for those other posts, I can't seem to edit them to remove them] [ETA2: thanks for fixing that!]
